title.en: Luminous Digital Bloom: The FLORA-9 Interface

description.ko: 유기적인 식물 형태가 복잡한 회로 패턴 및 홀로그램 빛과 결합된 FLORA-9의 시각화입니다. 이는 첨단 인공지능과 자연 세계 사이의 공생을 나타냅니다.
description.en: A breathtaking visualization of FLORA-9, where organic botanical forms merge with intricate circuit patterns and holographic light. It represents the symbiosis between advanced artificial intelligence and the natural world.

prompt: FLORA-9, digital nature, bioluminescent flowers with fiber optic stems, translucent petals made of glowing data streams, intricate geometric circuit patterns on leaves, ethereal garden in a cybernetic forest, soft neon colors, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic, macro photography
